title: Lockheed Martin Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
note: Provides current sales, earnings, backlog, free-cash-flow, and management context for company profitability and demand.

title: Lockheed Martin 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual-report source for business segments, risk factors, financial statements, and company structure.

title: Market capitalization of Lockheed Martin (LMT)
note: Market-cap reference supplied by the manifest and used for registry valuation context.

title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Statistics & Valuation
note: Secondary market-data reference for market capitalization and valuation multiples around the review date.

title: A Merger of Equals
note: Company historical reference showing Lockheed Martin was formed by the 1995 Lockheed and Martin Marietta merger, supporting the decision not to include an unsupported IPO object.

title: F-35 Lightning II
note: Official product source for the F-35 product profile.

title: PAC-3 Advanced Air Defense Missile
note: Official product source for PAC-3 product profile and missile-defense positioning.

title: F-35 Sustainment: Costs Continue to Rise While Planned Use and Availability Have Decreased
note: Documents F-35 sustainment cost and availability issues that motivate decentralization pressure around maintenance and mission substitution.

title: F-35 Joint Strike Fighter: More Actions Needed to Explain Cost Growth and Support Engine Modernization Decision
note: Documents F-35 modernization cost and schedule growth, supporting the product moat and disruption analysis.

title: Deputy Secretary of Defense Kathleen Hicks Announces Additional Replicator All-Domain Attritable Autonomous Capabilities
note: Official source for the DoD push toward all-domain attritable autonomous systems, an important enabler for mission substitution concepts.

title: Open Source Autopilot for Drones - PX4 Autopilot
note: Official PX4 project page describing the open-source drone and uncrewed-vehicle autopilot stack.

title: PX4 Autopilot User Guide
note: Technical documentation for the PX4 open-source autopilot ecosystem.

title: PX4/PX4-Autopilot
note: Public source repository for the PX4 Autopilot software.

title: ArduPilot - Versatile, Trusted, Open
note: Official project source for the open-source autopilot alternative.

title: ArduPilot/ardupilot
note: Public source repository for ArduPilot.

title: IBCS and the Future of Offensive and Defensive Integrated Fires
note: Describes resilient open-architecture command-and-control for integrated air and missile defense.

title: U.S. Army receives first, complete IBCS delivery
note: Official Army source describing IBCS delivery and air/missile-defense modernization relevance.

title: Machines: Global Village Construction Set
note: Open industrial-machine project used as an enabling reference for distributed local fabrication and microfactory concepts.

title: Open Source Hardware Definition
note: Reference for open-hardware principles used in open manufacturing and hardware-alternative scoring.

title: Foundations of Intelligent Additive Manufacturing
note: Technical review source for additive-manufacturing opportunities and constraints, especially in high-tolerance sectors such as aerospace.
